title: O Fire, Be Cool: Ibrahim and the Fire

sound.ambient: deep fire crackling ambience, low roar of flames, embers popping, warm and tense, no music, no melody, no instruments

_note: Cinematic Quran story #2 - Ibrahim and the fire (Surah al-Anbiya). Real aniconic FIRE footage via Pexels 'stock' (no people ever shown). Code scenes (scorched-sun/desert-night) are the no-key fallback. Verses 21:68, 21:69, 21:70 auto-pulled. Dramatic tone. Shop-waitlist ad closer. No em dashes.

segments.stock: huge bonfire flames at night dramatic
segments.text: They built a fire so vast it could be seen for miles, all to destroy one man who refused to bow to idols. Then God spoke to the fire itself.
segments.caption: O fire, be cool.

segments.stock: fire embers sparks rising dark night
segments.text: Ibrahim, peace be upon him, stood alone against his whole people. While they were away, he broke their idols to pieces, all but the largest, and left the axe in its hands.
When they returned in fury and demanded who had done it, he told them: ask the great one, if it can speak. They knew their gods could not even defend themselves.
They gathered wood for days. They lit a blaze so enormous that no one could stand near it. And they hurled him into its heart.

segments.stock: calm gentle blue fire embers glowing
segments.text: Then came the command, not to a prophet, not to an angel, but to the fire.

segments.stock: soft glowing embers calm warm light
segments.text: And the blaze that should have consumed him became cool. Calm. Safe. He sat in the very heart of the fire, unharmed.
segments.caption: Cool and safe.

segments.text: They had wanted to destroy him.
The fire meant to end him could not touch a single hair, because the One who made fire burn had told it to be still. Nothing can harm you without His permission.
segments.caption: Allah was with him.

segments.text: And comment which story from the Quran you want me to tell next.
segments.caption: Which story next?

data.headline: Something beautiful is coming
data.sub: Personalized storybooks, photo keepsakes, and cards sealed with a dua.

segments.text: And something beautiful is coming from Ketabi Studio. Personalized storybooks, keepsakes, and cards, each one sealed with a prayer. Join the founding list now, at Ketabi Studio dot com.

sources: Surah al-Anbiya 21:51-70 - Ibrahim breaks the idols, is sentenced to the fire, and Allah makes it cool and safe
Quran 21:68 ('Burn him and support your gods, if you are to act') - auto-pulled
Quran 21:69 ('O fire, be coolness and safety upon Ibrahim') - auto-pulled
Quran 21:70 ('And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers') - auto-pulled
Ibrahim broke the idols except the largest and left the tool on it (21:57-58, 63); told them to ask the biggest idol (21:63)

claims.claim: Ibrahim broke the idols to pieces except the largest one
He told them to ask the biggest idol (showing the idols were powerless)
They said: 'Burn him and support your gods, if you are to act'
Allah said: 'O fire, be coolness and safety upon Ibrahim'
'They intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers'
